	& {I_1} & {I_2} & {I_3} & \cdots &&& {I_1/I_{10}} & {I_2/I_{10}} \\
	{I_4} & {I_5} & {I_6} & \cdots && {} & {} & {I_5/I_{10}} & {I_6/I_{10}} \\
	{I_8} & {I_7} & {I_9} &&&&& {I_7/I_{10}} & {I_9/I_{10}} \\
	& {I_{10}} &&&&&& {I_{10}/I_{10}}
	\arrow[no head, from=1-3, to=2-2]
	\arrow[no head, from=1-3, to=2-3]
	\arrow[no head, from=1-3, to=2-4]
	\arrow[no head, from=1-3, to=2-5]

	\arrow[no head, from=2-2, to=3-2]
	\arrow[no head, from=2-3, to=3-2]
	\arrow[no head, from=2-3, to=3-3]
	\arrow[no head, from=2-3, to=3-4]
	\arrow[no head, from=2-8, to=3-8]
	\arrow[no head, from=2-9, to=3-8]
	\arrow[no head, from=2-9, to=3-9]
	\arrow[no head, from=3-1, to=4-1]
	\arrow[no head, from=3-2, to=4-2]
